name: Noodle Pudding (Kugel)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, beat together the eggs, sugar, lemon juice, salt, vanilla, and melted butter.
2. In another bowl, cream together the cottage cheese and cream cheese.
3. Divide half of the egg mixture evenly among the cooked noodles.
4. Divide the other half of the egg mixture into the cottage cheese and cream cheese mixture.
5. Place a layer of noodle and egg mixture in a greased baking dish.
6. Add a layer of pineapple on top.
7. Add spoonfuls of the egg and cheese mixture on top of the pineapple.
8. Repeat steps 5-7 until all ingredients are used.
9. Sprinkle cinnamon and brown sugar over the last layer.
10. Cover with foil and bake at 400°F for 40 minutes.
11. Remove foil and bake uncovered for an additional 15 minutes to lightly brown.
